content: I reviewed the updated design doc and reran your current `tests/app.test.js`; the direction and coverage are solid: the parsed-token rewrite approach, explicit `+`/`-` header affordance, mixed/absolute/range-endpoint cases, and structural undo/redo coverage all line up with the remaining judged risk. The main thing that changed is trunk state: PR 364 is already merged, so current main now includes browser-visible structural controls. Because of that, I would not package this as another structural-edits PR unless you first diff against current main and find a concrete gap or regression that 364 missed.
